narrative.identity: At 34, Kawhi Leonard is a Score-First Wing operating on craft and engineered footwork rather than the explosive two-way force he was at his peak. He stands 6'7" with a 7'3" wingspan, around 225 pounds, and carries hands large enough to swallow the ball. The credentials anchor a generational competitive resume: 2x Finals MVP, 2x Defensive Player of the Year, 7x All-Star, 6x All-NBA. Multi-season knee management has recalibrated his athletic baseline. Leonard's ceiling is limited, but he is still an elite two-way threat.
narrative.strength: Offensively, Leonard is one of the league's most efficient half-court scorers. At this stage in his career, his game centers around this proficiency. The mid-range is the signature: 46.8% on 215 attempts at a career-high 26.6% diet share, with footwork that gets the 15-footer off against any defender. Catch-and-shoot three is automatic at 40.3%, the pull-up jumper holds at 37.4% from deep with a 50.0% pull-up mid-range, and the free throw is 87.9%. He runs primary creator at 30.8% usage, generates an 84th-percentile pick-and-roll attack, and turns drives into 50% conversion with elite ball security on 10.2 drives per game.
narrative.weakness: Defensively the picture is honest: functional, not elite. Opposing teams shoot 2.9% above expected against him as the closest defender. He has not made an All-Defensive team since 2021 and has admitted directly that he is no longer at the same level; the sustained product is solid coverage, not the lockdown wing he was at his peak. Help defense is the same shape: he handles his individual matchup but does not anchor team rotations the way he did in San Antonio or Toronto. Playmaking is the other limiter, with assists functional rather than engine-level at 30.8% usage. Strength remains a structural elite trait while burst and lateral quickness sit at solid-wing baseline now.
narrative.projection_verdict: Leonard is a closing-window star operating on craft and credential. The realistic ceiling is sustained All-Star presence with All-NBA reach if the 2024-25 first-round form against Denver, 25 points per game on 63% true shooting across seven, sustains alongside continued 2025-26 durability. The realistic floor is a closer's role rather than a primary engine if chronic-knee management accelerates the decline. The 2014 and 2019 Finals MVP version is gone, but the mid-range and free-throw engine plus the generational competitive resume keep him productive through this final cycle.

domains.name: Finishing
domains.one_line: Three finishing dimensions productive: elite at-rim conversion on low volume, plus functional post and average-wing contact.

domains.name: Shooting
domains.one_line: Engine of the profile, elite at every shooting zone with mid-range and free throw both at superstar-level conversion.

domains.name: Ball Skills
domains.one_line: Tight cluster of strengths; handle elite for size, signature touch on floaters, ball security strong at primary-handler volume.

domains.name: Playmaking
domains.one_line: Solid floor across; off-ball cutting genuinely above-average, with vision and execution as functional limiters at high usage.

domains.name: Defense
domains.one_line: Below the elite-defender bar he peaked at; functional but no longer All-Defensive level, opponents shoot above expectation.

domains.name: Rebounding
domains.one_line: Defensive board work strong for a wing at 16% rebound rate, with offensive crashing situational rather than defining.

domains.name: Athleticism
domains.one_line: Strength a structural defining trait; burst and lateral recalibrated to solid-wing baseline rather than peak above-rim.

domains.name: IQ / Motor
domains.one_line: Shot selection elite at high usage and competitive character anchored by Finals MVP credentials; motor solid-not-elite at baseline.

sub_domains.name: At-basket finishing
sub_domains.rationale_public: Rim 73.6% on 17.2% volume, dunk rate 25.3%, non-dunk rim 68.9%; elite conversion at low volume with drive points-per-possession 0.69 a modest secondary signal.

signature.name: Rim Finisher
signature.description: Conversion at the basket through any means: rim finishes, touch finishes, floaters, fingerrolls, off-hand layups, and above-rim plays.

sub_domains.name: Contact finishing / foul draw
sub_domains.rationale_public: Free-throw rate 0.276 weighted with current 0.331 trending, free-throw conversion 87.9% since 2024-25; functional contact wing without scheme-defining foul rate.

sub_domains.name: Post offense
sub_domains.rationale_public: Footwork and strength enable bailout-craft post sequences against wing matchups, with reduced volume from peak.

sub_domains.name: Catch-and-shoot 3PT
sub_domains.rationale_public: 40.3% on 343 attempts, corner 41.1%, above-the-break 38.8%; consistent precision off the catch on real volume.

signature.name: Sniper
signature.description: Spot-up shooting off the catch from three. Footwork, release consistency, and range depth on attempts that arrive in rhythm.

sub_domains.name: Off-dribble shooting
sub_domains.rationale_public: Pull-up 3PT 37.4%, pull-up mid-range 50.0% since 2024-25; isolation points-per-possession 0.904 (52nd percentile) below the catch-and-shoot and pull-up rates.

signature.name: Pull-Up Shooter
signature.description: Creating own shot off the dribble. Pull-ups, step-backs, and self-generated separation moves with a clean release over a contest.

sub_domains.name: Mid-range
sub_domains.rationale_public: 46.8% on 215 attempts at 26.6% diet share; signature elite weapon with footwork unlocking the 15-footer over any defender.

signature.name: Mid-Range Threat
signature.description: Pull-up and catch-and-shoot scoring from the elbow and baseline mid-range zones. A diminished but real weapon at the NBA level.

sub_domains.name: Free throw
sub_domains.rationale_public: 87.9% weighted, 86.3% career, current 89.2%; automatic at the line on heavy primary-creator volume.

sub_domains.name: Handling / creation
sub_domains.rationale_public: Pick-and-roll handler points-per-possession 1.034 (84th percentile), 10.2 drives per game at 50% conversion, 30.8% usage since 2024-25.

signature.name: Shot Creator
signature.description: Dribble tightness, move variety, and live-dribble creation. Beats defenders with handle alone and generates scoring opportunities for self or teammates.

sub_domains.name: Touch / feel
sub_domains.rationale_public: Floater 51.7% on 360 attempts (36.3% of total field-goal attempts), non-dunk rim 68.9%; signature middle-of-floor touch.

signature.name: Soft Touch
signature.description: Fingertip control at the point of contact between hands and ball. Backboard finishes, fingerrolls, soft catches, and accurate pass delivery.

sub_domains.name: Ball security
sub_domains.rationale_public: 2.0 turnovers per game at 30.8% usage since 2024-25, assist-to-turnover 1.73, drive turnover rate 5.8%; pristine at primary-handler load.

signature.name: Sure-Handed
signature.description: Protecting possession in traffic. Two-hand securing, ball discipline on drives and in the post, and low live-ball turnover rate.

sub_domains.name: Court vision
sub_domains.rationale_public: 3.4 assists per game, adjusted assist rate 14.9% since 2024-25, potential assists 6.2; functional reads, not anticipatory weapon.

sub_domains.name: Decision-making
sub_domains.rationale_public: Assist-to-turnover 1.73 at 30.8% usage since 2024-25, drive turnover rate 5.8%; clean clutch decisions on primary-creator load.

sub_domains.name: Passing execution
sub_domains.rationale_public: 8.9 assist points created per game, low execution-error rate; delivers what he attempts cleanly.

sub_domains.name: Off-ball movement
sub_domains.rationale_public: Cut points-per-possession 1.475 (87th percentile), transition 1.280 (88th percentile); off-screen efficiency 0.956 below the cut and transition rates.

signature.name: Off-Ball Threat
signature.description: Reading and using screens, cutting decisively, and creating space without the ball. Combines IQ with sustained motion in the half-court.

sub_domains.name: On-ball pressure
sub_domains.rationale_public: Opponents shoot 2.9% above expected as closest defender since 2024-25; functional individual coverage, no longer the lockdown wing he peaked as.

sub_domains.name: Help defense
sub_domains.rationale_public: Defensive rating 110.8, charges 0.00, blocks 0.4; functional individual matchup play but not connective help engine.

sub_domains.name: Rim protection
sub_domains.rationale_public: 0.4 blocks, 1.6 contested two-pointers; will contest at the rim with limited deterrence value.

sub_domains.name: Post defense
sub_domains.rationale_public: Post-up defense 0.727 points-per-possession (89th percentile on 0.3 possessions per game); strength supports switches against wings.

sub_domains.name: Offensive rebounding
sub_domains.rationale_public: Offensive rebound rate 3.5%, contested chance rate 54.9% since 2024-25; situational crasher, perimeter-zoned but engaged on contested chances.

sub_domains.name: Defensive rebounding
sub_domains.rationale_public: Defensive rebound rate 16.0% strong for a wing, defensive rebound chance 71-74% since 2024-25; actively pursues, genuine wing rebounding value.

sub_domains.name: Burst / explosion
sub_domains.rationale_public: Historical 32" standing / 38" max vertical; current craft-and-economy framing reflects post-knee recalibrated baseline, not temporary suppression.

sub_domains.name: Lateral quickness
sub_domains.rationale_public: Recovery suffers when not at full capacity; active hands at 3.3 deflections per game and frame-strength partially offset.

sub_domains.name: Strength
sub_domains.rationale_public: 6'7"/7'3" wingspan/11.25" hands/~225 lbs; structural defining trait, too strong to screen and too long to elude on contact.

signature.name: Bruiser
signature.description: Functional basketball strength. Holds position, absorbs and initiates contact, sets displacing screens, and finishes through physicality at the rim.

sub_domains.name: Shot selection
sub_domains.rationale_public: True shooting 61.3% at 30.8% usage since 2024-25, 46% contested with elite conversion; healthy shot-clock distribution at primary-creator load.

signature.name: Shot IQ
signature.description: Taking the right shots — reading defenses, knowing when to shoot, pass, or attack. High true shooting earned through shot quality, not volume.

sub_domains.name: Effort / motor
sub_domains.rationale_public: 65 games played healthy, 57 consecutive 20-point games; professional approach with average movement speed, not a high-motor profile.

sub_domains.name: Competitive character
sub_domains.rationale_public: 2x Finals MVP / 2x Defensive Player of the Year / 7x All-Star resume; career +1.6% true-shooting playoff rise across 12 seasons / 146 games.

signature.name: Competitor
signature.description: Physicality and intensity when the game is hard. Performance holds in close games, rivalry matchups, and elimination scenarios. Withstands adversity without withdrawing.

projection.spread_note_public: Realistic potential 8.90, a sustained Score-First Wing at the recalibrated late-career baseline. Realistic floor 7.80 if chronic-knee management accelerates decline; realistic ceiling 9.00 if 2024-25 playoff form sustains alongside 2025-26 durability; moderate confidence.

comps.similarity_public: Late-career Score-First Wing arc with sustained scoring engine, signature mid-range mastery, and championship credential weight. Defensive identity erodes from peak two-way to functional while scoring efficiency holds well into the 30s.
